description: Triggers for LinkedIn profile optimization for job searching and recruiter attraction

queries.query: Optimize my LinkedIn profile to attract product manager recruiters
Rewrite my LinkedIn headline and About section for engineering roles
My LinkedIn is getting no recruiter messages — audit and fix it
Help me improve my LinkedIn profile for a career change to data science
Write a compelling LinkedIn summary for a senior marketing professional
Optimize my LinkedIn experience section with better keywords and impact
Build an all-star LinkedIn profile for a software engineer job search
Sync my resume with my LinkedIn profile for consistency
Make my LinkedIn profile searchable for fintech PM roles
Write an authentic first-person LinkedIn About section for an executive
Write a cover letter for a product role at Stripe
Format my resume for ATS compatibility
Prepare me for my Google interview next week
Compare my two job offers
Build an academic CV for postdoc applications
Help me negotiate my salary
Analyze this job description for fit
Write STAR stories for my behavioral interview
Create resume bullet points for my current role
Help me build a reference list for employers
